title: Best Adapted Screenplay - 2026 Oscars
text: Winner: Paul Thomas Anderson won for One Battle After Another (Warner Bros.). This was his first Academy Award after 11 previous nominations dating to 1998. He also won Best Picture and Best Directing that night, becoming just the ninth person to win Best Picture, Directing and Screenplay Oscars on the same night. Nominees: Will Tracy for Bugonia (Focus Features); Guillermo del Toro for Frankenstein (Netflix); Chloé Zhao & Maggie O'Farrell for Hamnet (Focus Features); and Clint Bentley & Greg Kwedar for Train Dreams (Netflix). Anderson's screenplay achievement was particularly significant as it concluded an extended awards season where One Battle After Another and Sinners competed fiercely against each other across multiple ceremonies.
